summary: Both REQ-12 and REQ-13 appear to be implemented. The backend migration file (backend/migration.mo) pre-populates sample products across Electronics, Clothing, and Home & Kitchen categories, and the frontend SeedProducts component (frontend/src/components/SeedProducts.tsx) seeds 13 products across 3+ categories with Unsplash image URLs. However, there is a concern about REQ-12: the backend sample image URLs use 'https://example.com/images/...' placeholder URLs which are not publicly accessible stock/placeholder image URLs as required by the constraints. The nextProductId is set to 11 in main.mo suggesting 10 products are pre-populated (IDs 1-10), satisfying the >=10 requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Sample product image URLs must be publicly accessible placeholder/stock URLs
missing_requirements.reason: The backend migration.mo uses 'https://example.com/images/headphones.jpg', 'https://example.com/images/jacket.jpg', etc. as image URLs. The example.com domain does not serve real images — these are not publicly accessible placeholder or stock image URLs.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) implementing a data migration from LegacyProduct (image as Blob) to Product (image as {name, url, mimeType} object)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requested pre-populating sample products. A full migration module handling schema changes from blob-based images to URL-based images was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: SeedProducts component includes a progress bar and per-product counter during seeding
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required the Seed Products button to create 10+ products across 3+ categories. Progress bar and per-product counter UI were not requested.
